scene_description: A cinematic avant-garde composition with a direct gaze, complex textures, and controlled light distortion. Centered close-up portrait of a fashion subject, framed by a massive, sculptural garment structure with accordian-pleated translucent fabric, layered holographic foil, and iridescent moire patterns. Shot with complex studio lighting filtered through crystalline prisms, creating prismatic chromatic aberration and soft diffused teal shadows. Cyber-surrealist editorial style digital glitch art, hyper-sharp details, shot on 85mm prime lens at f/2.8.
